complexity.justification: Contains loop-based processing, random access, delete operations, and error handling logic.

rules.natural_language_rule: The system initializes a predefined list of customer IDs to be deleted before processing begins.

rules.cobol_snippet: PERFORM VARYING WS-Key-SUB FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-Key-SUB > WS-Key-Element-Cnt
rules.natural_language_rule: Each customer ID in the key table is iteratively processed to locate and delete the corresponding record.
Once a customer record is successfully accessed, it is permanently deleted from the indexed file.
The system increments a counter for every successfully deleted customer record.
If a delete operation fails, the program displays an error message, performs cleanup, and terminates execution.
